entries: [New feature] Support for tablets and desktops with a new 2-pane view!
[New feature] Take notes and assign emojis to a month itself!
[Improvement] On mobile, tapping the notes area opens a full-screen editing view, ideally making editing notes easier
Fixed issue where calendar would explode if it was the 31st of the month
Fixed issue where calendar height was not correctly adjusting to content
Improved scrolling performance for calendar slider
Emoji picker language is now selectable
Fix for bug where month view would sometimes not appear
Improved scrolling performance in emoji picker sheet
Option to show public holidays on calendar
